name: autoresearch
description: Autonomous experiment loop: hypothesize → review → execute → evaluate, with budget gating and best-result tracking. Extracted from autonomous-world-model patterns.

daily_budget.description: Maximum spend per day across experiments (USD)

weekly_budget.description: Maximum spend per week across experiments (USD)

max_concurrent_experiments.description: How many experiments may be in_flight at once

stale_timeout_hours.description: Hours of inactivity before an in_flight experiment is considered stale

scale_tier_threshold.description: Estimated cost (USD) above which an experiment requires human approval
